title: Specific Functionality of Plans
excerpt: I’m unclear about whether or not the Gantt view is available to Individual accounts.  It seems to be there, but when I changed from free trial to Individual, it was removed.  Seems to be back now.  I want to be sure I ha…

posts.author: REPeter2020 (Bob Petersen)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m unclear about whether or not the Gantt view is available to Individual accounts. It seems to be there, but when I changed from free trial to Individual, it was removed. Seems to be back now. I want to be sure I have it going forward.
